name: claude-custom
description: Personal workflows ported from Claude commands and skills for issue worktrees, migrations, reviews, reports, writing, and codebase analysis

interface.shortDescription: Personal issue, review, reporting, writing, and code-analysis workflows
interface.longDescription: Ports Lev's custom Claude skills and commands to Codex, including devkit issue workflows, Kysely migration validation, Graphify, report generation, writing guidance, and stacked-git operations.
interface.defaultPrompt: Show me the custom workflows available in this plugin.
